title: Query and modify data with Transact-SQL
summary: Learn how to use Transact-SQL (T-SQL) to interact with relational databases by querying and modifying data. This course covers essential operations such as inserting, updating, deleting, and merging data across tables. You'll also explore how to generate automatic values and apply changes efficiently using SQL Server or Azure SQL environments.

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Query and modify data with Transact-SQL
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Query and modify data with Transact-SQL**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
